metadata.purpose: Paper exercise suite: every file targets specific papers so all 20 are exercised at least once
metadata.design: Each file is crafted with the bytecode / loop / compositional patterns needed to trigger specific paper engines

ex01_guarded_division.py.pattern: if divisor != 0: x / divisor — bytecode guard proof

ex03_simple_while_loop.py.pattern: while x < 10: x += 1 — simple affine loop

ex04_two_var_while_loop.py.pattern: while i < n: i += 1 — parametric bound

ex06_guarded_sqrt.py.pattern: if x >= 0: math.sqrt(x) — guarded FP_DOMAIN hazard

ex07_guarded_index.py.pattern: if 0 <= idx < len(items): items[idx] — guarded BOUNDS hazard

ex08_compositional.py.pattern: producer + consumer + pipeline — multi-function + while loops

ex09_nested_function_loop.py.pattern: while loop inside nested def — tests code-object scanning

ex10_all_papers.py.pattern: guard + while-loop + multi-function — exercises all 20 papers

ex11_two_var_affine.py.pattern: while x < 10: x+=1; y+=2 — multi-dimensional affine

ex13_multiple_guards.py.pattern: multiple guarded div/mod/sqrt/index — rich bytecode scanning

ex14_conditional_loop.py.pattern: while loop inside if — control flow around loop

ex15_unguarded_division.py.pattern: a / b without guard — true positive div-zero

ex17_accumulator_loop.py.pattern: while i < n: total += i; i += 1 — two modified vars

ex18_mixed_safe_bug.py.pattern: safe loop + unguarded sqrt — mixed safe/bug

ex20_guard_multi_func.py.pattern: guarded div + mod across helper functions
